programs.description: living room: domestic social and relaxation space for family gathering and leisure
bedroom: private domestic sleeping and rest space, personal retreat from the world
library: quiet space for study, reading, and book storage, knowledge and contemplation
laboratory: scientific research and experiment workspace with controlled conditions
hospital room: clinical medical care space for patient treatment and recovery
cafeteria: communal institutional eating area with self-service and shared tables
conference room: formal meeting space for professional discussions and presentations
dance hall: large open space for dancing, movement, and social performance
waiting room: liminal space for anxious or passive waiting before an event or appointment
gym: physical training and exercise facility with equipment and open floor space
workshop: craft, fabrication, and making space with tools and workbenches
gallery: art exhibition and display space with controlled light and neutral walls
nursery: infant and toddler care and play space scaled to small children
office: administrative knowledge-work space for desk-based professional tasks
chapel: small sacred space for quiet worship, prayer, and spiritual contemplation
spa: wellness and bathing retreat for therapeutic relaxation, massage, and body care
cinema: dark screened room for immersive film projection and collective viewing
classroom: teaching and learning space with student seating facing an instructor
atrium: tall glazed public lobby or internal courtyard, monumental transitional space
restaurant: curated social dining space for shared meals with table service and atmosphere
